body:
Resolves https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/issues/3750

Also supercedes #3794 where some tests are failing, not sure why. But that PR goes a bit further to clean up conditional ops. I think we want that too but let's start with this.

cc @ali-ramadhan

labels.description: So we can get the wrong answer even faster
labels.name: performance 🏍️

title: New Base.axes for AbstractField

body:
Also does a bit of clean up.

In the future we need to move `ConjugateGradientPoissonSolver` to `Solvers` module.

Also I would like to rename `PreconditionedConjugateGradientSolver` to just `ConjugateGradientSolver` cause repetitive stress injury from too much typing is a real problem.

labels.description: So things don't blow up and boil the lobsters alive
labels.name: numerics 🧮

title: Enforce gauge condition in preconditioners for ConjugateGradientPoissonSolver
